fields.name: Service Orders - in Process
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of in process service orders that are displayed in the Service Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Service Orders - Finished
fields.tooltip: Specifies the finished service orders that are displayed in the Service Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Service Orders - Inactive
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of inactive service orders that are displayed in the Service Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Open Service Quotes
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of open service quotes that are displayed in the Service Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Open Service Contract Quotes
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of open service contract quotes that are displayed in the Service Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Service Contracts to Expire
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of service contracts set to expire that are displayed in the Service Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Service Orders - Today
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of in-service orders that are displayed in the Service Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Service Orders - to Follow-up
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of service orders that have been marked for follow up that are displayed in the Service Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Date Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date interval that values are filtered by.
If this field contains starting and ending dates for a date interval, then other field values only show information for that interval.
You can enter a date interval according to the following rules.


Meaning


Sample expression


Entries that are included


Equal to

12 15 12

Only entries that are posted on December 15, 2012.


Interval

12 15 12..01 15 13
..12 15 12

Entries that are posted on dates between and including December 15, 2012, and January 15, 2013.
Entries that are posted on January 15, 2012, or earlier.


Either/or

12 15 12|12 16 12

Entries that are posted on either December 15, 2012, or December 16, 2012. If there are entries that are posted on both days, then all entries are displayed.


You can also combine the various format types.


Sample expression


Entries that are included


12 15 12|12 01 12..12 10 12

Entries that are posted either on December 15, 2012, or on dates between and including December 1, 2012, and December 10, 2012.


..12 14 12|12 30 12..

Entries that are posted on December 14, 2012, or earlier, or entries that are posted on December 30, 2012, or later, which includes all entries except those that are posted on dates between and including December 15, 2012, and December 29, 2012.

fields.name: Responsibility Center Filter
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.
